claim_boundary: Certification grid at g=32, 500 reps (MCSE ~0.010): the PROFILE interval reaches NOMINAL coverage (0.948-0.956) and Wald is near-nominal (0.934-0.964). Confirms the slope under-coverage is small-sample and the profile channel is the supportable one. Certifies coverage AT g=32 only; does NOT promote the g-agnostic support cell (a 'supported for g>=N' claim is design-inappropriate per Fisher), does NOT advance interval_status (a separate unmeasured rung), keeps coverage_status planned. Deployment g=8 profile is a documented near-miss ~0.91 (vs Wald 0.88). REML engine-blocked this cycle.
